Request Your Free Quote

Brad will be in touch within 24 hours.

No obligation · Response within 24 hours · 100% confidential

Common Questions

We aim to respond to all enquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, call Brad directly on 0403 866 061.

Absolutely — our site consultation is completely free and obligation-free. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed custom quote.

We primarily service Brisbane and surrounds, including South East Queensland, the Sunshine Coast, and Gold Coast. Contact us with your suburb to confirm.

It helps to have a rough idea of your block size, budget range, and any pool ideas — but don't worry if you're still figuring it out. We're happy to guide you from scratch.

Mediterranean Pools Queensland

Brisbane's trusted custom concrete pool builders. Family-owned with over 30 years of experience — delivering premium pools with honesty, quality, and genuine care.
